overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark forest at night. The character travels along a winding dirt path that transitions from grassy terrain to rocky ground, crossing a small stream and passing a stone wall before encountering farm animals in a clearing. Light rain falls throughout the scene, creating atmospheric lighting in the dense woodland environment.

events.description: small stream becomes visible along the right side of the path
passing a stone wall structure on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the forest path with sword on back, navigating through dense woodland

entered.detail: Dense evergreen trees forming the forest canopy
Narrow dirt trail winding through the forest
Green grass and small plants lining the path edges
Narrow waterway running parallel to the path
Low stone wall structure beside the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking through a dense forest at night. The path is surrounded by tall pine trees and grass undergrowth. Around 10 seconds, a small stream becomes visible along the path, and shortly after, the character passes a stone wall on the left. The environment is dark with low lighting, and light rain creates atmospheric white streaks in the air.

events.description: path begins ascending uphill with more rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking uphill on increasingly rocky terrain, continuing through the dense forest

entered.detail: Large rock formation visible on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions to a more rocky gravel path as Geralt continues uphill through the forest. The stone wall and stream from the previous segment are left behind. The path becomes steeper and more rugged, with rocky outcrops visible on the sides. The dense tree cover remains consistent, maintaining the enclosed forest atmosphere.

events.description: domestic animals appear grazing near the path in a clearing

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching and passing by farm animals in a forest clearing

notable_agents.action: pig grazing near the path edge in the clearing

entered.detail: Wooden post marking the boundary of the clearing

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a clearing where wooden fence posts appear on the right. Around 50 seconds, farm animals become visible grazing near the path. The terrain returns to dirt from rocky gravel, and the vegetation becomes less dense. Geralt continues walking past the animals, maintaining a steady pace through the rural forest environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, rainy forest that gradually transitions from a dense woodland path into an open rural clearing. It begins with Geralt walking through tall pine trees and grass undergrowth, passing a small stream and a stone wall under a veil of atmospheric rain. As the character continues uphill, the soft terrain shifts into a steeper, more rugged path of rocky gravel and outcrops while the dense tree cover maintains an enclosed feeling. The scene then opens as the forest thins, with the rocky ground returning to dirt and wooden fence posts appearing on the right. Finally, the path expands into a clearing where farm animals graze nearby before the camera follows Geralt steadily past them into the rural landscape.
